samples.xml_description:
Accumulate input data and output after 4 inputs. Clock. Active-low reset. 8-bit input data. Valid input signal. Valid output signal. 10-bit output data. 0 1 2 State. Next state. Counter. Next counter. Sum. Next sum. Next valid output. Always accumulate 4 input data and output after 4 inputs.
When valid_in is 1, data_in is a valid input.
Accumulate 4 valid input data_in values and calculate the output data_out by adding these 4 values together.
There is no output when there are fewer than 4 input data_in values in the interim.
Along with the output data_out, a cycle of valid_out=1 will appear as a signal.
The valid_out signal is set to 1 when the data_out outputs 4 received data accumulation results.
Otherwise, it is set to 0.
